title: Doner Kebab
description: A classic Turkish dish made from layers of lamb stacked on a vertical spit and thinly sliced for serving in a crispy pita. This recipe brings the flavors of the street to your kitchen.

ingredients.name: Lamb Doner Meat
ingredients.notes: Look for pre-sliced doner meat at your local butcher or market

ingredients.name: Pita Bread
ingredients.notes: Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 5 minutes

instructions: Wrap the pita bread in foil and heat it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Slice the doner meat into thin strips and cook in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned and crispy.
Warm the tzatziki sauce in the microwave or on the stovetop.
Assemble the kebabs by placing a few slices of the doner meat onto a warmed pita bread, followed by a dollop of tzatziki sauce, some chopped lettuce, tomato, onion, and cucumber.
Season with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes, if desired.
